name: claude-kit
description: RMP Software's company-wide Claude Code tooling — shared skills, agents, and harnesses installable across every repo.

plugins.name: rmp
plugins.description: Spec-driven feature harness: write a spec, break it into Linear issues, then implement each sub-issue with an adversarial coder/reviewer split and hard evidence gates. Includes a generic, spec-driven compliance reviewer. Skills invoke as /rmp:<name>.
